EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the fifth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Lead_5th Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Still interested in receiving an insurance quote?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’m following up on my previous attempts to provide you with a quote for your business insurance.
I understand that there can be many reasons why you may not be interested right now and I wanted to check if any of these apply to you.
Current policy not due to expire? If you let me know your expiry date for your business insurance policy, I can give you a call nearer the time to arrange your quote.
Got a quote elsewhere? We can often match like-for-like quotes, so if you let us know the cover levels and the quoted price you have received I can see if we can provide a better quote for you.
Want no further contact? If you are not interested in receiving a quote, just let me know and I will ensure I don’t contact you again.
Alternatively, if you are still interested in proceeding with your quote, reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
